name: stackra/retention
purpose: Retention scanner — discovers models carrying #[AsRetentionPolicy] and applies delete / archive / anonymize actions on a scheduled cadence.
capabilities: Delete / archive / anonymize action branches (archive + anonymize deferred)
Framework-tier, no domain knowledge, no per-app coupling
when_to_use: A model has a retention cutoff (e.g. delete AI runs older than 180 days) and needs a scheduled sweep.
when_not_to_use: For DSAR/consent orchestration or legal-hold-aware policies, use stackra/compliance which extends this substrate.
